explanation: The user instruction is to put all the potatoes in the cabinet. Since no specific potatoes are mentioned in the state, I assume there are multiple potatoes available. I generate a plan to pick up each potato one by one and place it in the cabinet. The suffix _0, _1, _2 is used for the potatoes as they are new objects and not referenced in discussed_objects. The plan ensures that each potato is picked up and placed in the cabinet sequentially, following the rule that an object can only be placed if it is being held.
